collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (14 total Queries, 14 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT MONTHNAME(tgl_pesan) as bulan_nama, SUM(total_harga) as total FROM `orders` WHERE YEAR(tgl_pesan) = '2026' GROUP BY MONTH(tgl_pesan), MONTHNAME(tgl_pesan) ORDER BY MONTH(tgl_pesan) ASC
SELECT DATE(tgl_pesan) as tanggal, SUM(total_harga) as total FROM `orders` WHERE `tgl_pesan` >= '2026-05-28' AND `status_pembayaran` != 'dibatalkan' GROUP BY DATE(tgl_pesan) ORDER BY `tanggal` ASC

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT MONTHNAME(tgl_pesan) as bulan_nama, SUM(total_harga) as total FROM `orders` WHERE YEAR(tgl_pesan) = '2026' GROUP BY MONTH(tgl_pesan), MONTHNAME(tgl_pesan) ORDER BY MONTH(tgl_pesan) ASC

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT DATE(tgl_pesan) as tanggal, SUM(total_harga) as total FROM `orders` WHERE `tgl_pesan` >= '2026-05-28' AND `status_pembayaran` != 'dibatalkan' GROUP BY DATE(tgl_pesan) ORDER BY `tanggal` ASC
